name: CampaignOps: Experiment Tracker
description: Compute experiment results per variant, run Bayesian analysis, check for winners, generate recommendations. NEVER auto-stop — only recommends.

parameters.query: SELECT ea.variant_id, oe.event_type, re.reply_type FROM experiment_assignments ea LEFT JOIN outreach_events oe ON ea.lead_id = oe.lead_id LEFT JOIN reply_events re ON ea.lead_id = re.lead_id WHERE ea.experiment_id = '{{ $json.id }}' AND oe.created_at >= ea.assigned_at

parameters.subject: Experiment Winner Detected!
parameters.text: Experiment {{ $json.experiment_name }} has a clear winner. Recommendation: {{ $json.recommendation }}. Action required: manually stop experiment and adopt winning variant.
